questionHtml:
Which is a density-independent limiting factor for a kangaroo?


A.  A forest fire

B.  Predation

C.  Climate change

D.  Eutrophication

meta.title: Which is a density-independent limiting factor for a kangaroo? A. A forest fire B. Predation C. Climate change D. Eutrophication
